Total Nonfarm Payroll Employment: Monthly Change
Source: BLS Series Report CES0000000001, all employees, thousands, total nonfarm, seasonally adjusted.
Monthly change is calculated as current-month level minus prior-month level.
June 2026 was requested but was not posted in the official BLS current page checked; it is kept as a pending row in the data sheet.
October 2025 has no Employment Situation report in the archive; the value is computed from the latest official CES series.

values: NFP Change vs Time - Sources and Notes
All employees, thousands, total nonfarm, seasonally adjusted
Latest value available in source checked
Pending/not posted in the BLS current page checked
The workbook calculates signed monthly change as current-month BLS total nonfarm payroll employment level minus the prior-month level.
Units are thousands of jobs in the main change column. For example, +172 means +172,000 jobs.

The BLS archive cautions that archived releases may later be revised. The data table uses the latest official BLS CES series values available from the BLS Series Report page checked, not the unrevised first-published headline value for every old release.

BLS archive states the October 2025 Employment Situation was not published because of the 2025 lapse in federal government appropriations; the numeric value shown for October 2025 is calculated from the latest official CES time series.
The chart excludes June 2026 because there was no numeric value in the official BLS series page checked.
